assetId.description: Image drawable for an image asset

originX.description: Origin x in normalized coordinates (0.5 = center, 0 = left, 1 = right).

originY.description: Origin y in normalized coordinates (0.5 = center, 0 = top, 1 = bottom).

fit.description: Fit type for the Image, determines how the image resizes within its layout container.

alignmentX.description: Alignment value on X, determines how the image aligns horizontally in its layout container.

alignmentY.description: Alignment value on Y, determines how the image aligns vertically in its layout container.
